query: SELECT id, title, genre, mood, SUBSTRING(lyrics, 1, 80) as lyrics_preview, created_at FROM tracks WHERE audio_url LIKE '%d2xsxph8kpxj0f.cloudfront.net%' AND lyrics IS NOT NULL AND lyrics != '' ORDER BY created_at ASC;
